act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Filing of return.—(1) Every person, registered or enlisted or required to
content:
64. Filing of return.—(1) Every person, registered or enlisted or required to
be registered or required to be enlisted, shall, in such manner as may be prescribed by
the Board, file the return for each tax period within a period not exceeding 15 (fifteen)
days after such tax period expires.
(2) A VAT return, inclusive of the information on the payment of
supplementary duty, shall be filed.

sub_sections.text:
Every person, registered or enlisted or required to
be registered or required to be enlisted, shall, in such manner as may be prescribed by
the Board, file the return for each tax period within a period not exceeding 15 (fifteen)
days after such tax period expires.

A VAT return, inclusive of the information on the payment of
supplementary duty, shall be filed.
